group.value: Group E — opponents Germany, Ivory Coast, Ecuador

milestone.value: Smallest nation EVER to reach a men's World Cup — population ~156,000, ~444 km². Took the record from Iceland (2018). First-ever World Cup appearance in 2026.

qualification.value: Won CONCACAF qualifying Group B UNDEFEATED with 12 points; sealed it with a 0-0 draw at Jamaica in Nov 2025.

manager.value: Dick Advocaat (Dutch veteran, ~78) — among the oldest managers ever at a World Cup (verify 'oldest' superlative before asserting).

wc_opener_result.value: Lost 7-1 to Germany in their first-ever World Cup match (Group E, NRG Stadium, Houston, 14 Jun 2026). Livano Comenencia scored Curaçao's first-ever World Cup goal to briefly level it 1-1 before Germany ran away with it.
